translation_notes: Entry: 'Penetration of the close' interpreted as close crossing previous close (direction-dependent). Exit: 'Exit on the next open' means exit at the opening price of the next bar after entry. Using 15-30 minute intraday timeframe as specified. hold_days_max set to 1 to enforce same-bar entry/next-bar exit logic. Entry option (3) and exit option (2) noted from source but not further specified in allowed parameters.
validation_issues: exit_long: phantom condition 'open > 0' is always true
exit_short: phantom condition 'open > 0' is always true
